problem id: e6d3a97b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  00111110 -> 01110010
  00011000 -> 00001111
  01111010 -> 11011000
  11010110 -> 11100101
  11101010 -> 01111101
  00100000 -> 10111110
  00111000 -> 01001110
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00001000 -> 10101111

query: 01111011
predicted answer: 11010010
